sql_array: CREATE TABLE graph_data (graph_uri VARCHAR, stats_data VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE stats_agg (stat_item VARCHAR, count_val INT);
INSERT INTO stats_agg (stat_item, count_val) VALUES ('Stat1', 10), ('Stat2', 20), ('Stat3', NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_VOID_STORE(graph_uri, 'http://example.com') FROM graph_data WHERE graph_uri SIMILAR TO 'http://graph%' LIMIT 5;
SELECT * FROM stats_agg WHERE count_val IS NOT NULL AND (stat_item SIMILAR TO 'Stat%') ORDER BY count_val DESC;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_VOID_STORE('http://graph1', CONCAT('http://example.com/stats_', (SELECT MAX(count_val) FROM stats_agg WHERE count_val IS NOT NULL))) FROM dual;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_VOID_STORE('http://graph2', 'http://example.com/stats') AS void_store_output FROM graph_data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stats_agg WHERE count_val > 15);

SELECT g.graph_uri, DB.DBA.RDF_VOID_STORE(g.graph_uri, 'http://example.com/stats') FROM graph_data g JOIN stats_agg s ON g.stats_data SIMILAR TO CONCAT('%', s.stat_item, '%') WHERE s.count_val IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.graph_uri HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_data AS SELECT * FROM stats_agg WHERE count_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT 1 AS val INTO temp_val FROM dual; INSERT INTO temp_data (stat_item, count_val) SELECT 'NewStat', val FROM dual WHERE val IS NOT NULL;
